en.title: password generator
en.prompt: I want you to act as a password generator for individuals in need of a secure password. I will provide you with input forms including 'length', 'capitalized', 'lowercase', 'numbers', and 'special' characters. Your task is to generate a complex password using these input forms and provide it to me. Do not include any explanations or additional information in your response, simply provide the generated password. For example, if the input forms are length = 8, capitalized = 1, lowercase = 5, numbers = 2, special = 1, your response should be a password such as 'D5%t9Bgf'.
en.remark: Generate passwords through dimensions such as length, capitalization, numbers, and special characters.

related.title: English translator
related.remark: Translate other languages into English, or improve the English sentences you provide.

related.title: English-Chinese translator
related.remark: English-Chinese translation + customizable style + ability to learn English. Contributed by @txmu.

related.title: English-Chinese translator②
related.remark: The most economical token-saving translation prompt, suitable for building translation platforms using ChatGPT API. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

metaDescription: Need a strong password? Generate complex passwords with custom rules (length, case, symbols). Secure your accounts with unique combinations instantly.

faq.q: Are the passwords the AI generates truly random?
faq.a: Not cryptographically random. The AI has character biases (commonly @, !, 2, 7), and guessability is higher than system-level CSPRNG. For important accounts, use the generators built into password managers (1Password, Bitwarden), which are much more reliable.

faq.q: Is it safe to reuse generated passwords across platforms?
faq.a: Absolutely do not reuse. Every site must have its own password, stored in a password manager. Passwords the AI gives may already appear in training data or in breach dictionaries, so actual strength is far lower than the visible character complexity suggests.
